_comment: Single source of truth for fair scheduling data. Consumed by js/schedule.js, which renders into hook elements on home.html (timeline) and schedule.html (master timeline, registration phases, fair-day itinerary).
_milestones_comment: Feeds the '2025 Fair Timeline' section on home.html (only entries with featuredOnHome: true) AND the 'Master Timeline' section on schedule.html (all entries). home.html uses shortDescription; schedule.html uses longDescription.

milestones.title: Registration Opens
milestones.shortDescription: Student and project registration begins online.
milestones.longDescription: Online portal opens for student project submissions and initial abstract reviews.

milestones.title: SRC/IRB Pre-Approval
milestones.shortDescription: Approval deadline for projects with human, animal, or hazardous-agent research.
milestones.longDescription: Deadline for projects involving human subjects, vertebrate animals, or hazardous agents.

milestones.title: Final Project Submission
milestones.shortDescription: Final deadline for all digital project materials.
milestones.longDescription: All final research papers, digital display boards, and signed forms must be uploaded.

milestones.title: Judge Assignments
milestones.longDescription: Judges are assigned to projects and receive preliminary access for review.

milestones.title: LA Science Fair Day
milestones.shortDescription: Setup, safety checks, judging, and awards ceremony.
milestones.longDescription: In-person judging, public viewing, and awards ceremony.

_registrationPhases_comment: Feeds the 'Registration Phases' bento card on schedule.html only. Not used by home.html. Exactly one phase should have status: 'current' to render the highlighted 'Current Phase' card.

registrationPhases.name: Early Bird
registrationPhases.description: Fee: $35 per student. Priority abstract review included.

registrationPhases.name: Standard Registration
registrationPhases.description: Fee: $50 per student. All standard safety forms required.

registrationPhases.name: Late Submission
registrationPhases.description: Fee: $75 per student. Subject to availability and strict review.

_fairDay_comment: Feeds the 'Fair Day Itinerary' bento card on schedule.html only. Not used by home.html. headline + venue render as the card subtitle ('<headline> - <venue>'); itinerary rows render in order. Set highlighted: true to emphasize a row, or badge: '...' to add a pill (e.g. 'Mandatory').

itinerary.title: Safety Verification Closes
itinerary.description: All projects must pass final display and safety checks.

itinerary.title: Official Judging Commences
itinerary.description: Students must remain at their exhibits. No parents allowed on floor.

itinerary.title: Lunch Break
itinerary.description: Cafeteria and external food trucks available.
